arts.ttl: Why isn’t Alisson Becker playing against Bournemouth? Liverpool team news
arts.sum: The Brazilian goalkeeper played the full 90 minutes in the midweek win against AC Milan but reported a soreness on Thursday, forcing him to miss team practice. Now 25 years old, Kelleher is Ireland’s first-choice for the national team and notably played in both the 2022 and 2024 League Cup finals, keeping two clean sheets in Liverpool wins.
